revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bare_URL_inline%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|bare inl|bare inline}} {{bots|deny=Citation bot}} {{high use|8761}} This template is an inline alternative to {{Tl|Cleanup bare URLs}}. == Usage == Paste this after a bare-URL reference/link: :{{Tlx|Bare URL inline|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} It is best to place the tag {{em|inside}} a citation, just before the closing {{xtag|ref|c}} tag: * https://www.salon.com/2020/01/31/the-disaster-of-utopian-engineering_partner/ {{tlp|bare URL inline|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ** '''Result:''' https://www.salon.com/2020/01/31/the-disaster-of-utopian-engineering_partner/ {{bare URL inline}} {{talkref}} This will still categorize the page for cleanup without cluttering the present paragraph with "[bare URL]", and it will also help track down the citation to improve by keeping the cleanup tag in the citation. It also allows the tag to be removed by tools such as [[WP:reFill]] and {{u|Citation bot}} if they fill the reference with a citation template. When doing it this way, the date must be manually entered; it cannot be done with the {{Bare URL inline|{{subst:[[:en:Template:DATE|DATE]]}}}} shortcut method, because [[WP:SUBST|template substitution]] does not work inside {{xtag|ref|p}} tags. === Tracking categories === *This template places the article into both of the following categories: **[[:Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]] — {{PAGESINCATEGORY:All articles with bare URLs for citations}} pages **[[:Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations]] or a dated subcategory thereof, currently ***[[:Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}]] — {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles with bare URLs for citations from {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} pages {{Purge|''Purge this page to update pages-in-category counts''}} === Why? === See [[WP:Bare URLs]] === How to respond to this tag === See [[WP:HOWCITE]] == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "reason": { "label": "Reason", "description": "A brief reason for the tag. Avoid using wikilinks, as they will be converted to plain text in the output." }, "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Month and year of tagging; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "suggested": true } }, "description": "An inline template which indicates that a reference contains a bare URL, which may be threatened by link rot. It is best to place the tag inside a citation, just before the closing tag.", "format": "inline" } == See also == * {{Tlx|Bare URL PDF}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL AV media}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL DOC}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL image}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL plain text}} * {{Tlx|Bare URL spreadsheet}} * {{Tlx|Cleanup bare URLs}} * {{Tlx|Citations broken}} * [[Wikipedia:Link rot]] * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] {{Inline cleanup tags}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Inline cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
